core_principles: Map-First UI: The map and overlay must always be the primary focus. Use minimal UI chrome. Let the map breathe.
Glove-Friendly Interaction: Keep interactions simple, fast, and accessible. Use large touch targets and minimal taps.
Dark-First Outdoor Optimization: Built exclusively for low-light and outdoor conditions. True dark canvas with tactical overlays.
High Contrast Overlays: Markers and paths must instantly pop on complex satellite/topo backgrounds.
Progressive Disclosure: Avoid clutter. Use bottom sheets to reveal advanced options contextually.
Tactical Aesthetics: Modern, professional, non-game-like. Subtle topographic textures for depth, but mostly clean backgrounds.

typography.strategy: Tactical Minimalism. Heavy-weight athletic/tactical feel for headings, high-legibility geometric sans for body.

headings.family: Barlow Condensed, Chivo, or similar bold sans

spacing_and_layout.touch_targets: CRITICAL: All buttons and interactive areas MUST be at least 48x48px (min-h-[48px] min-w-[48px]) for glove compatibility.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, strict hierarchy for data correlation. Use tight gaps (gap-4).
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Use bottom-sheet architectures to maintain map visibility. Panels should float with subtle 1px borders, no soft drop-shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C89B3C] text-[#0B1F2A] font-bold rounded-md px-6 py-4 min-h-[56px] uppercase tracking-wider border-none
buttons.secondary: bg-[#3A4A52] text-white border border-[#9AA4A9]/30 rounded-md px-6 py-4 min-h-[56px] uppercase
buttons.icon_buttons: bg-[#0B1F2A]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#3A4A52] rounded-full p-3 min-h-[48px] min-w-[48px]

panels_and_cards.style: bg-[#0B1F2A]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-l border-[#3A4A52] rounded-t-2xl shadow-none

map_markers.style: High opacity solid fills with crisp white or black 2px borders to guarantee visibility over noisy satellite imagery.

forms.inputs: bg-[#3A4A52]/50 border border-[#9AA4A9]/40 text-white rounded-md px-4 py-4 min-h-[56px] focus:border-[#C89B3C] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C89B3C]

motion.rules: Utilitarian only. Slide-up bottom sheets, instant opacity toggles for active states. No bouncy or playful animations.

backgrounds.description: Subtle topo map lines on midnight blue. Use as an absolute positioned background overlay with opacity-20 on non-map screens or empty states.

placeholders.description: Overhead satellite forest view to simulate map upload or background map view.

species.description: Deer in forest image for species selection cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing. Convention: kebab-case, role-based.
Build a Map-First interface. The root screen should display the map background, and all navigation/wizards should operate via bottom sheets, modals, or floating action bars over the map.
Apply the Midnight Blue (#0B1F2A) as the root background color, and Steel Gray (#3A4A52) for elevated panels.
Use Burnt Gold (#C89B3C) ONLY for primary Call-to-Actions and critical highlights.

For the AI Analysis overlay, use the specified hex codes: #2E7D32 (Stands), #F57C00 (Corridors), #42A5F5 (Routes), #C62828 (Avoid). Ensure these markers use a solid fill with a 2px contrasting border to pop against the map.
Apply the topo_texture image with an opacity layer on the 'Saved Hunts List' empty state or condition form background.
Avoid soft drop shadows. Use 1px borders (#3A4A52 or #9AA4A9 at low opacity) to define surfaces on dark mode.
Respect glove-friendly UI sizing. Inputs and buttons MUST be min-h-[48px].
